title: Is Bionano Genomics (BNGO) Undervalued After Q1 2026?
text: Bionano Genomics reported Q1 2026 results with revenue of $6.7M slightly missing analyst expectations of $7.52M estimate. EPS not disclosed in the analysis, but the company reported net loss. GuruFocus GF Score is 56/100, indicating mixed fundamentals. The stock is estimated to be 50.2% undervalued at current price levels. Positive factors: improving gross margin (49%), consumables revenue growth (20% YoY), flow cell unit sales growth (17%), reimbursement rate increase (47% for CPT 81195), new CPT code activation (81354). Negative factors: revenue miss vs estimate, overall revenue still flat to down, cash burn continues, going concern disclosures, dilution from equity financing. Bull case points to strong clinical evidence, improving unit economics, reimbursement tailwinds, and installed base leverage. Bear case focuses on execution risks, market adoption uncertainty, and near-term cash needs. The valuation analysis suggests potential upside if the company can accelerate revenue growth while maintaining margin improvements.
